NAME: hg38
KEYWORDS: GRCh38; UCSC; reference genome; FASTA; primary assembly
DESCRIPTION: UCSC Genome Browser distribution of the human reference aligned to GRCh38 (primary assembly plus standard patches and decoys as packaged in the browser bigZips downloads). Chromosome names use the chr1-chrM convention; coordinates match the corresponding GRC assembly for the same patch level when sequences are identical.
CITATION: UCSC Genome Browser. Human reference assembly hg38 (GRCh38-aligned). https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/hg38/
